projects.name: Vivum
projects.tagline: Open index for interactive scientific publishing
projects.description: An open registry for interactive, web-native scientific articles with community peer review by threshold and citable DOIs via Zenodo. Authors self-publish at any URL and retain full ownership. The infrastructure Chris Olah identified as missing when Distill went on indefinite hiatus in 2021.

projects.name: Global Shapers Valencia
projects.description: The Global Shapers Community is a World Economic Forum network of young leaders under 30, active in 400+ cities worldwide. Joined the Valencia Hub as a Shaper in June 2025; appointed Incoming Curator in December 2025. Formally taking on the Curator role — the Hub's top leadership position — in June 2026.

projects.name: Valencia Fallas Route Optimization
projects.tagline: Metaheuristics for festival route planning, featured in local media
projects.description: Applied metaheuristics algorithms to optimise walking routes for visiting Valencia's Fallas festival — a network of 800+ monuments spread across the city. The project attracted local media coverage and demonstrated how combinatorial optimisation applies to real-world civic problems.

projects.name: Bankinter Innovation Foundation
projects.description: Mentored student teams in the Akademia programme (2023–2025) on AI algorithm development and model architecture. Currently serving on the 2026 expert panel to evaluate project proposals for innovation potential and technical viability.

projects.name: Freelance AI/ML Consulting
projects.tagline: Independent machine learning and data projects
projects.description: Occasional freelance engagements in machine learning, data analysis, and AI development. Projects span model development, custom pipelines, and technical consulting for clients across different industries.
